name: Cilantro Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Cooked, unpeeled "New" Potatoes (halved if small, Quartered if large)
recipeInstructions: (note: If serving uncooked egg is worrisome, substitute 1/4 cup "Simply Eggs" for the whole egg) Place egg and cilantro in food processor or blender. Start processing and slowly stream in 1/2 cup of the oil. Add garlic, 1/2 teaspoon salt and 4 turns of black pepper, then stream in remaining 1/2 cup of oil. Process until thoroughly emulsified into a mayonnaise. Pour the mayonnaise into large bowl and add potatoes, onion, and remaining 1/2 teaspoon salt and 3 turns of black pepper. Toss to combine thoroughly, cover, and refrigerate for up to 24 hours.
